name: Mississippi Mud Pie 2
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUST: Mix pecans and walnuts and add to your favorite pie crust recipe, or if desired, use 2 frozen pie crusts, baked according to package instructions, with nuts divided evenly over bottom of crusts. Set aside to cool.
2. FILLING: Mix cream cheese, sour cream, confectioner's sugar and 1 tsp vanilla with electric mixer or food processor until well blended. Divide evenly between pie crusts. Refrigerate for 2 hours or longer.
3. TOPPING: In a bowl, blend 1/4 cup sugar, cornstarch, flour, cocoa, salt, 1/4 cup milk and egg yokes; set mixture aside.
4. Place 2 cups milk and 3/4 cup sugar in a saucepan and bring to a boil over high heat, whisking constantly, until boiling ingredients are combined. Transfer boiling ingredients back into saucepan and bring to boil, stirring constantly, over medium heat. Continue to cook for 5 minutes. Stir in 1 tablespoon butter and 1 tsp vanilla and almond extracts. Cool and spoon over Pies.
5. Refrigerate Pies. Makes 2 pies.
